title: STRDT positiveInteger typed as integer
description:
Query:
SELECT (DATATYPE(?X) AS ?TYPE)  WHERE
{
BIND(STRDT("3", xsd:positiveInteger) AS ?X)
}

Result:



TYPE




http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, positive_val INTEGER CHECK (positive_val >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, positive_val) VALUES (1, 'Test Value', 3);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE positive_val IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET positive_val = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: STRDT function misinterprets positiveInteger as integer
